title: Codex Persistent Goals and Automatic Continuation · Guided Harness Build
summary: Operate a long Codex task with a persistent goal, checkpoints, and user control. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a Codex persistent-goal operating playbook while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.
Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.
Design automatic continuation around verified progress and safe terminal conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
